PathtoIT

Home Lab Server - Enterprise Infrastructure

Professional Windows Server with IIS Web Hosting

Server Status: Online

This website is hosted on Internet Information Services (IIS) running on Windows Server inside a virtual machine. Powered by PathtoIT infrastructure expertise.

System Specifications

  • Host Device: Infinix X1 Laptop
  • Host Processor: Intel Core i3 (10th Generation)
  • Host Memory: 8GB RAM
  • Host OS: Windows Server
  • Virtual Machine: Windows Server 2019/2022
  • VM Memory: 2GB RAM (allocated)
  • Web Server: IIS (Internet Information Services)
  • Storage: 40GB dynamic virtual disk
  • .NET Framework: 4.8+

Technology Stack

Windows Server IIS PowerShell HTML5 CSS3 Hyper-V Virtualization Enterprise

About This Project

This home lab demonstrates enterprise-grade web server hosting using Windows Server and IIS. Built with PathtoIT's dedication to professional infrastructure, the solution showcases advanced web hosting capabilities with Active Directory integration, security features, and enterprise scalability.

Network Access

To access this website from your host machine:

Step 1: Find VM IP with: ipconfig
Step 2: Visit: http://<VM-IP>
Example: http://192.168.1.50
Local Access: http://localhost

Key Features

✓ Enterprise-grade IIS Hosting
✓ Windows Server Management
✓ SSL/TLS Certificates
✓ Active Directory Ready
✓ .NET & ASP.NET Support
✓ Remote Desktop Access
Windows Server Docs IIS Documentation About Windows Server Azure Services

Powered by Windows Server + IIS + PowerShell
